title: Pari-mutuel wagering; commissions, fees, and other deductions
doc_html:
§629. Pari-mutuel wagering; commissions, fees, and other deductions

            Any commissions, fees, and other deductions on racehorse wagering shall be in accordance with Chapter 4 of Title 4 of the Louisiana Revised Statutes of 1950.

            Acts 2022, No. 530, §2.
doc_text:
§629.  Pari-mutuel wagering; commissions, fees, and other deductions
Any commissions, fees, and other deductions on racehorse wagering shall be in
accordance with Chapter 4 of Title 4 of the Louisiana Revised Statutes of 1950.
Acts 2022, No. 530, §2.
